rules.rule_text:
title: Xworm Anti-Analysis Module
id: cb42109e-9c68-4ae6-bac2-1b8224b60f3d
description: Detects XWorm anti-analysis module. More specifically when Xworm makes
  a call towards a IP Intellegence service and check wether the external ip address
  is demeed as hosting.
status: stable
author: Leandro Ferreira
references:
- https://vx-underground.org/Builders/XWorm/XWorm%20V6.0
- https://thehackernews.com/2025/10/xworm-60-returns-with-35-plugins-and.html
date: 2025-12-12
modified: 2025-12-12
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    http_method: GET
    url_host: ip-api.com
    uri_path: /line/
    uri_scheme: http
    uri_query: fields=hosting
    http_user_agent: null
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate binaries that legitimately use the service
level: high
